query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `gs1_attribute_code_lists` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `attributeId` int NOT NULL,
  `code` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `sortOrder` int DEFAULT 0,
  `isActive` boolean DEFAULT TRUE,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `gs1_attribute_code_lists_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  INDEX `attribute_id_idx` (`attributeId`)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 31QbGTVHxF7ThTp.root --database cozU6EotfgGjqPV9552owj --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `gs1_attribute_code_lists` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `attributeId` int NOT NULL,
  `code` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `sortOrder` int DEFAULT 0,
  `isActive` boolean DEFAULT TRUE,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `gs1_attribute_code_lists_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  INDEX `attribute_id_idx` (`attributeId`)
)
